zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye於大約1025年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德布萊也時，他的父親Geoffrey Taillefer38歲，母親Petronille d'Archaic32歲。他於1041年與Agnes Perigord在法國阿奎泰吉洛德布萊也布萊也結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1098年在英國諾薩普頓史爾維特林享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye于大约1025年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰吉洛德布萊也时，他的父亲Geoffrey Taillefer38岁，母亲Petronille d'Archaic32岁。他于1041年与Agnes Perigord在法国阿奎泰吉洛德布萊也布萊也结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1098年在英国諾薩普頓史爾維特林享年75岁。

variants.name: Telfer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French taille ‘cut’ + fer ‘iron’, perhaps for a strong man or ferocious warrior. The nickname was also used as an Anglo-Norman personal name.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye was born about 1025, in Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Geoffrey Taillefer, was 38 and his mother, Petronille d'Archaic, was 32. He married Agnes Perigord in 1041, in Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1098, in Wittering, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye est né environ 1025, à Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Geoffrey Taillefer, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Petronille d'Archaic, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Perigord en 1041, à Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1098, à Wittering, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye um 1025 in Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey Taillefer 38 und seine Mutter Petronille d'Archaic 32. Er hat 1041 in Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich Agnes Perigord geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1098 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Wittering, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye è nato il circa 1025 nel Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffrey Taillefer, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Petronille d'Archaic, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Perigord nel 1041, nel Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1098, nel Wittering, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blayeが約1025年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインギロンドブレイで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Tailleferは38歳，母Petronille d'Archaicは32歳であった。1041年にフランスアクイティアインギロンドブレイブレイでAgnes Perigordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1098年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィッテリングで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye(이)가 대략 1025년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 지론드 블레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Taillefer(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronille d'Archaic(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1041년 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 블레이 블레이에서 Agnes Perigord(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1098년 영국 노르섬프토실르 윗테링에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye nasceu aproximadamente 1025, em Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Geoffrey Taillefer, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Petronille d'Archaic, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Perigord em 1041, em Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1098, em Wittering, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye родился около 1025 г. в местности блеи, гиронд, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Taillefer было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronille d'Archaic, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Perigord в 1041 г. в местности блеи, блеи, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1098 г. в местности виттиринг, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffroi Taillefer d’Angoulême seigneur de Blaye nació aproximadamente 1025, en Blaye, Gironde, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey Taillefer, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Petronille d'Archaic, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Agnes Perigord en 1041, en Blaye, Blaye, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1098, en Wittering, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
